record.field:
Life events & civil status

Passports, IDs, marriages, births, residency registration, and voting enrollment.

Housing, building & planning

Renovation permits, urban planning updates, zoning maps, and property tax assessments.

Mobility, parking & streets

Residential parking stickers, road closures, bike lane updates, and public transit schedules.

Waste, environment & public works

Trash collection calendars, bulky item disposal, recycling guides, and pothole repair tracking.

Venue rentals & leisure

Booking the City Hall ballroom, meeting suite, civic green garden, or local sports fields.

Local business & commerce

Market stall applications, sidewalk terrace permits, signage authorization, and local business listings.
How to plan your civil wedding

How to plan your civil wedding

A civil marriage at City Hall is a beautiful milestone. To ensure your special day complies with municipal regulations, couples must officially submit their marriage file at least 6 weeks prior to the desired ceremony date.

📋 Required Documents Checklist (PDF uploads preferred):

  • Valid photo ID or passport for both applicants.

  • Certified copy of birth certificates (issued within the last 3 months).

  • Proof of municipal residency for at least one applicant (e.g., utility bill).

  • "Witness information form" completed for 2 to 4 witnesses (minimum 18 years old).

🔄 Step-by-Step Process:

  1. Download the wedding form: Available for download below.

  2. Prepare your file: Gather all required checklist documents digitally.

  3. Book your civil file review: Schedule a 30-minute face-to-face appointment with our Citizen Sync-Specialist to officially lock in your date.

  4. The big day: Arrive at the Horizon Hall (Ballroom) 20 minutes before your scheduled ceremony time with your witnesses and guests.

💰 Cost & Timing: 

  • Administrative file processing: Free.

  • Horizon hall rental (optional friday/saturday slots): See venue rental rates.

  • Processing window: Minimum 6 weeks notice required.

⬇️ Downloads
How to apply for a residential renovation or building permit

How to apply for a residential renovation or building permit

To maintain the architectural harmony and safety of our neighborhoods, any external property modification (e.g., building an extension, adding a pool, changing roof tiles, or installing structural fences) requires prior approval from the Municipal Planning Department.

📋 Required Documents Checklist:

  • Up-to-date plot plan/land survey showing current structures.

  • Architectural blueprints or dimensional sketches of the planned modification.

  • Photos of the property from the street perspective.

  • Completed Digital Construction Form (Form 404-A).

🔄 Step-by-Step Process:

  1. Check zoning rules: Confirm if your property falls under specific heritage zone restrictions using our Interactive Map.

  2. Submit digitally: Fill out Form 404-A and upload your blueprints securely online.

  3. Technical review: Our urban planning engineers will review the safety and zoning compliance of your file.

  4. Receive authorization: Once approved, your digital permit certificate will be issued directly to your Citizen Portal. Print this and display it visibly on your property during the works.

💰 Cost & Timing: 

  • Minor modifications (fences, sheds): $45 processing fee.

  • Major construction (extensions, structural changes): $150 processing fee.

  • Processing window: 15 to 30 business days.
How to rent a municipal space (ballroom, meeting suite, or garden)

How to rent a municipal space (ballroom, meeting suite, or garden)

Whether you are hosting a corporate seminar, a non-profit fundraiser lottery, or a private family gathering, our modern City Hall facilities are available for private citizens and organizations to lease.

📋 Required Documents Checklist:

  • Proof of identity (or corporate registration if booking for an organization).

  • Valid Third-Party Liability Insurance Certificate (covering event dates).

  • Signed Municipal Venue Rules & Liability Agreement.

🔄 Step-by-Step Process:

  1. Explore available venues: Review the catalog pages for the Horizon Hall, Innovation Suite, or Civic Green Plaza to check surfaces, capacity, and configurations.

  2. Check live availability: Select your desired date and time block on our digital rental calendar.

  3. Submit booking & secure deposit: Pay the security deposit online to lock your reservation.

  4. Check-in & access: Pick up your digital access pass or meet the facility manager on-site at the start of your rental window.

💰 Cost & Timing: 

  • Rates: Dynamic hourly or daily pricing depending on resident status (local residents receive a 25% discount).

  • Security deposit: A refundable deposit is required for all bookings and is released 48 hours post-event following a facility inspection.
